description: A photograph of a stack of plastic paint-style buckets with blue lids on a floor against a cinderblock wall. A printed placard rests on top showing a Customs and Border Protection field-operations seal and text reading U.S. Customs and Border Protection, Office of Field Operations, Laredo Field Office, Port of Laredo, TX. The bucket labels reference an acrylic product.
notable_text: U.S. Customs and Border Protection; Office of Field Operations; Laredo Field Office; Port of Laredo, TX
